title: foreign_key_constraint for graceful FK error handling
prompt: In MyApp.Blog.Comment.changeset/2, add `foreign_key_constraint(:post_id)` so that if a client submits a post_id that doesn't exist in the posts table, the insert returns a friendly changeset error instead of a raw Postgres exception. Write to lib/my_app/blog/comment.ex.
tier_rationale: Single foreign_key_constraint call, but Sonnet often skips it entirely, letting raw Postgres exceptions reach the client.
